rules.name: PowerShell IEX Download Cradle
rules.author: Florian Roth
rules.content:
title: PowerShell IEX Download Cradle
id: 9a1b2c3d-0001-4a00-9000-000000000001
status: stable
description: Detects PowerShell downloading and executing remote content via IEX.
author: Florian Roth
level: high
logsource:
    product: windows
    category: process_creation
detection:
    selection:
        Image|endswith: '\powershell.exe'
        CommandLine|contains|all:
            - 'IEX'
            - 'DownloadString'
    condition: selection
tags:
    - attack.execution
    - attack.t1059.001

rules.name: Rundll32 Without Parameters
rules.author: Nasreddine Bencherchali
rules.content:
title: Rundll32 Without Parameters
id: 9a1b2c3d-0002-4a00-9000-000000000002
status: experimental
description: Detects rundll32.exe execution without command line parameters.
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali
level: medium
logsource:
    product: windows
    category: process_creation
detection:
    selection:
        Image|endswith: '\rundll32.exe'
    filter:
        CommandLine|contains: '.dll'
    condition: selection and not filter
tags:
    - attack.defense_evasion
    - attack.t1218.011

rules.name: Registry Run Key Persistence
rules.author: Roberto Rodriguez
rules.content:
title: Registry Run Key Persistence
id: 9a1b2c3d-0003-4a00-9000-000000000003
status: stable
description: Detects modification of the Run key for persistence.
author: Roberto Rodriguez
level: medium
logsource:
    product: windows
    category: registry_set
detection:
    selection:
        TargetObject|contains: '\CurrentVersion\Run\'
    condition: selection
tags:
    - attack.persistence
    - attack.t1547.001

rules.name: DNS Query to Known C2 Domain
rules.author: ThreatLens Community Seed
rules.content:
title: DNS Query to Known C2 Domain
id: 9a1b2c3d-0004-4a00-9000-000000000004
status: test
description: Detects DNS resolution of a known command-and-control domain.
author: ThreatLens Community Seed
level: high
logsource:
    product: windows
    category: dns_query
detection:
    selection:
        QueryName: 'malware-c2.example.net'
    condition: selection
tags:
    - attack.command_and_control
    - attack.t1071.001
